content: We can borrow the vocabulary teaching framework from the high school English Reflexion vocabulary lesson to design a structured scaffolding for LLM self-reflection, where each incremental mastery of 'reflect' as a verb (action), 'reflection' as a noun (output) maps to staged LLM self-improvement, just like students learn the semantic gradient of the word to build reflective thinking. This creates a human learning routine that can be transplanted to autonomous agent self-reflection.
